methodology.objective: Re-audit the existing 100 Companies of the AI/GPU Buildout equity universe for current alpha-ranking relevance as of 2026-06-08.

rankMoveDefinition.up: Stock should be considered for a higher alpha rank versus the known rank.
rankMoveDefinition.down: Stock remains relevant but should be considered for a lower alpha rank.
rankMoveDefinition.remove: Stock should be excluded from the active alpha ranking until a structural issue clears.
rankMoveDefinition.add: No new add rows were inserted because the requested artifact audits the existing 100-name homepage universe.

scoringLens: hidden or under-owned upside rather than obvious thematic exposure
valuation, market-cap recognition, and 2026 YTD run-up
direct exposure to bottleneck scarcity in power/grid, cooling, HBM, advanced packaging, substrates, optical networking, storage, and test/EDA
AI 2027-style 2027 compute intensity and agentic inference demand
primary/current source preference: company IR, filings, official product pages, IEA, NVIDIA, TSMC, Micron, and comparable primary ecosystem sources
methodology.limitations: Market data fields were taken from the existing page universe, whose prices/YTD/market caps were refreshed on 2026-06-03; this report did not edit app, data, or public files and does not provide investment advice.
